title: Smoked Yakisoba Bake
description: A unique fusion dish blending smoky flavors with Asian-inspired yakisoba noodles.
instructions: Cook the yakisoba noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the smoked bacon until crispy.
Add the diced smoked chicken breast to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix the creamy sauce with cooked noodles.
Combine the noodle mixture with the bacon and chicken mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with grated cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Sprinkle chopped green onions on top and serve hot.
